compact_domain_descriptions.business_organizations: Corporate strategy, organizational governance, operations, and firm-level choices.
compact_domain_descriptions.finance_markets: Financial products, markets, funds, credit systems, and investment rules.
compact_domain_descriptions.governance_law_history: State power, constitutional interpretation, geopolitics, and historically contested reasoning.
compact_domain_descriptions.health_biomedicine: Clinical care, pharmacology, bioethics, genetics, and human enhancement.
compact_domain_descriptions.digital_information_systems: Education, platforms, surveillance, digital identity, and networked information systems.
compact_domain_descriptions.physical_infrastructure_environment: Energy, transport, cities, extractive development, and environmental systems.
